_about: Tracked companies for `python scripts/fetch_jobs.py scan --portals <this>`. Copy to data/<user>/portals.json (gitignored) and edit. Each entry: provider (greenhouse|lever|ashby|smartrecruiters), slug (the company/board slug on that ATS), optional match (case-insensitive title filter). scan lists all matches across companies and flags near-duplicate JDs (SimHash) reposted across companies.
